response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Primarily matched the reference lyrics for 'Friday Chinatown' and 'Otoko no Ko ni Naritai'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics for transcription. Corrected the typo 'kinosure' to the correct lyric 'kinuzure' based on standard lyric data and native audio cues. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to the vocal cues of the singers (IRyS and Subaru). Instrumental and transition portions are kept silent, with timing resuming immediately upon vocal re-entry.

subtitles.english: Speeding my bike down the highway of stars...

untie my ribbon
and let me be a boy,

someday chance,

subtitles.english: I want to become a boy, you see

...is what I want to do

...and a decorative cane,Safe to say
I'll decide on my final day
Just for today is fine,
make all my wishes come true,
I won't show the girl in me,

And then chance,
someday chance,
